'''''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'': Prima Official Game Guide''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games]] for [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'' video game]].

{{Book-stub}}
